title: Introduction to colons

questions.question_content:
**What is the colon doing in this sentence?**

> It’s important to learn the three “r’s”$\redD{:}$ reading, writing, and ‘rithmetic.

choices.label: A
choices.content: It’s introducing a list of items.

note: KA serves 1/4 questions to anonymous users. Passage and sample question captured for skeleton generation.
